AUCTION_AVOID.measurement: accepted and skipped outcomes by auction state
AUCTION_AVOID.reason: Auction context should be measured before it blocks.

DAILY_GIVEBACK_GUARD.reason: Protect green days from slow bleed.

FAILED_RECLAIM_NO_CHASE.reason: Sensible no-chase rule, but threshold should be loosened/tightened by evidence.

FIRE_MAX_AGE_SEC.measurement: stale-fire ghost outcomes by age bucket
FIRE_MAX_AGE_SEC.reason: Restart should not buy old fires; age threshold still needs measurement.

LIQUIDITY_PARTICIPATION_CAP.measurement: fill slippage, undersizing complaints, and P&L by participation rate
LIQUIDITY_PARTICIPATION_CAP.reason: Useful slippage control, but threshold needs route-specific tuning.

LIVE_DILUTION_RED_LONG_BLOCK.measurement: blocked dilution longs and dilution-short candidates

MAX_POSITIONS.reason: Portfolio exposure is a survival constraint.

MIN_DAILY_VOLUME.measurement: thin-name rejects versus slippage, 30d average volume, and realized results
MIN_DAILY_VOLUME.reason: Stops tiny-volume names from showing or trading. Enforces both live day volume and prior normal-volume floor so one spike day cannot impersonate liquidity.

MISSING_OR_INVALID_PRICE.reason: No reliable price means no order.

OVERHEAD_GAP.measurement: room-to-gap and gap genesis rank by route
OVERHEAD_GAP.reason: Under the multi-timeframe genesis-volume model, overhead gap is not universal; it is context.

PERMISSION_ROUTER.measurement: blocked route attempts and contract breaches
PERMISSION_ROUTER.reason: Route must be explicitly owned and permitted before it can trade.

PRICE_BAND.measurement: P&L and win rate by price band and route
PRICE_BAND.reason: Price band matters, but should be route-specific.

RISK_OFF_CLEAR_HIGHWAY.measurement: risk-off clear-highway longs versus non-clear-highway longs
RISK_OFF_CLEAR_HIGHWAY.reason: Risk-off long filter may save falling-knife entries, but whipsaw days can make it costly.

SECTOR_CAP_SHORTS.reason: One sector squeeze can eat the short book.

SHORT_COOLDOWN.reason: Prevents repeated stop-out re-entry on the same symbol.

SHORT_STRENGTH_VETO.measurement: day-up percent at entry versus stopped shorts
SHORT_STRENGTH_VETO.reason: Avoid shorting names already strong into green tape.

STALE_PULLBACK.reason: Prevents fills after the planned pullback collapsed below the setup.

STOP_GEOMETRY.reason: Entry, stop, and target must make directional sense.

SURGE_CLEAR_HIGHWAY_UNIVERSAL.measurement: surge outcomes by clear-highway score and gap map
SURGE_CLEAR_HIGHWAY_UNIVERSAL.reason: Clear highway is route-specific; hard universal use is not proven.

SURGE_ONE_ATTEMPT_PER_NAME.reason: Prevents chasing the same spike repeatedly.

SURGE_SUSTAIN_SECS.reason: <1m surge chases bled; developed pullbacks paid better.

UNMAPPED_LOCATION.reason: Missing context is an observability failure; block only after route policy says so.

ZERO_SIZE.reason: Zero-share orders are contract failures, not trades.

purpose: Route-specific gate re-add map. This artifact explains and routes gates; bot enforcement is a separate explicit step.
